clusters.name: Sovereign Cloud & Data Residency
clusters.rationale: High regulatory urgency post-DPDP Act. Enterprises and government actively searching. NeevCloud has unique India-sovereign positioning hyperscalers cannot match.
clusters.serp_gap: Top results are generic AWS/Azure pages or government circulars. No vendor explains MeitY empanelment + DPDP Act + RBI guidelines in one place. NeevCloud can own this.
recommended_posts: DPDP Act 2023: What Every Cloud Buyer Must Know Before 2026
MeitY Empanelment Explained: Why It Matters for Government Cloud Procurement
RBI Cloud Outsourcing Guidelines: A Compliance Checklist for Indian Banks
Sovereign Cloud vs Public Cloud: The Architecture Difference That Matters for BFSI
Data Residency India: How to Audit Your Cloud Stack for Compliance

clusters.name: GPU Compute & AI Infrastructure
clusters.rationale: Highest commercial intent. Buyers comparing GPU SKUs, pricing, availability. NeevCloud already has per-GPU pages — the programmatic substrate systematises what they do manually.
clusters.serp_gap: SERP dominated by AWS/Azure/GCP global pages with no India-specific pricing or availability. Lambda Labs and CoreWeave rank but have no India presence. NeevCloud can win every India-specific GPU query.
recommended_posts: H100 vs A100 for LLM Training: Performance Benchmarks on NeevCloud
GPU Cloud Pricing India 2026: H100 / A100 / B200 Compared
How to Run Llama 3.1 405B on a Single H100 Node: Cost & Setup Guide
LLM Training Cost Calculator: India GPU Cloud vs AWS vs Azure
NVIDIA B200 NVL72 Availability India: What You Need to Know

clusters.name: Cloud Migration & Enterprise Infrastructure
clusters.rationale: Long buying cycle but high ACV. CTOs and platform leads researching migration paths. Comparison and checklist content ranks well and drives inbound.

keywords.keyword: AWS to private cloud migration India

clusters.serp_gap: Most migration content is US-centric or from large SIs. India-specific migration cost models, compliance-aware migration checklists, and repatriation case studies are almost absent.
recommended_posts: AWS to NeevCloud Migration: A 90-Day Technical Playbook
Cloud Repatriation India: When On-Prem Makes Financial Sense Again
Hybrid Cloud Architecture for Indian Enterprises: A Reference Design
DC Colocation vs Managed Cloud India: TCO Comparison 2026

clusters.name: BFSI & Regulated Sector Cloud
clusters.rationale: BFSI is NeevCloud's highest-ACV vertical. Compliance explainers rank long-term and build E-E-A-T with procurement teams. Low competition from cloud vendors who avoid compliance specifics.
clusters.serp_gap: RBI/IRDAI/SEBI circulars rank but are undigestible. No vendor translates regulatory requirements into cloud architecture decisions. High opportunity for authoritative explainers.
recommended_posts: RBI Master Circular on IT Outsourcing: What It Means for Your Cloud Stack
IRDAI Cloud Guidelines 2024: A Compliance Map for Indian Insurers
BFSI Cloud Architecture India: Meeting RBI + DPDP + MeitY Simultaneously

clusters.name: AI/ML Platform & MLOps
clusters.rationale: Fast-growing segment. AI leads and ML engineers researching infrastructure choices before executive buy-in. Benchmark and how-to content performs strongly with this persona.
clusters.serp_gap: Very thin India-specific content. Most MLOps and GPU cluster guides are US/EU-centric. Technical audience highly engaged — will read and share detailed how-to content.
recommended_posts: Setting Up a Kubernetes GPU Cluster on NeevCloud: Step-by-Step
Fine-Tuning Llama 3.1 on Indian Cloud: Cost, Setup, and Benchmarks
InfiniBand vs Ethernet for GPU Clusters: When It Matters
MLflow on NeevCloud: A Complete MLOps Setup Guide

volume_model.rationale: 80/week target met without touching editorial quality ceiling. 65% of volume is programmatic (templated GPU SKU × region × use-case pages) where NeevCloud already has the underlying data. Editorial spine of 8/week maintains E-E-A-T signal. Long-tail fills remaining 20 with comparison and FAQ content.
